title: ateleia multijuga
intro: Ateleia multijuga, also known as the yellow-stemmed Ateleia or yellow-stemmed pea shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Ateleia multijuga include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Ateleia multijuga is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is traditionally combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
